The final move in this drawn game (1/2-1/2) is **\boxed{b7g2}**.

The game ends with a repetition of the same position (the 50-move rule or threefold repetition), so the last move must be a legal continuation that doesn't change the material or position. Here, **b7g2** (a pawn move) is the only logical move that maintains the drawn outcome.
